text:
Every night when I wake up.

I try to do nice things.

I wear nice clothes.

I buy nice things.

I talk nice.

Sometimes I swear.

Anyway.

I miss my wife.

I miss my kitten.

I love my job.

I love my life.




That's OK.




That's love.




That's us.




Those are my two.



I guess I could say I love life.





That's good.




That looks nice.




That's me.




You love.


That good.




That's forever.



I think.







That'll do.







That’s love.












You have my heart.




That sounds nice.







That's special.



You think?



You believe?



That's right.



You think good.



That you love.





That's enough.




That's me.



That means.









That's our secret.







I think.




That's good.




I don't know.



Anyway.







Wow.



That feels good.




That feels right.




That's peaceful.




That's true.



I think.







I love.



That
